context: [Peter Gordon Essex-Lopresti (1918-1951), surgeon at Birmingham Accident Center, England] Mechanism:   FOOSH-type injury √  "floating radius": √  comminuted displaced radial head fracture √  dislocation of distal radioulnar joint = discrepancy of radioulnar distance > 5 mm compared to contralateral uninjured wrist (on lateral radiograph) √  disruption of interosseous membrane Rx:  nearly always surgical intervention Galeazzi Fracture [Ricardo Galeazzi (1866-1952), orthopedic surgeon in Italy] =  PIEDMONT FRACTURE Mechanism:   fall on outstretched hand with elbow flexed √  radial shaft fracture
